items.claim: Abdul Hussein hits significantly hard despite being undersized at 135 pounds.
items.quote: Abdul Hussein hits significantly hard for being 5'5. It's the truth. He is small for 135 pounds.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein knocked out Tyson Nam in his last fight outside of the UFC.
items.quote: Abdul Hussein knocked out an old UFC veteran in Nam in his last fight outside of the UFC.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is on a two-fight losing streak going into this bout.
items.quote: He's lost back toback going into this one.

items.claim: Cody Gibson was submitted in the second round by Deon Blackshere.
items.quote: He got submitted in the second round by Deon Blackshere.

items.claim: Cody Gibson was knocked out in 25 seconds by Ori Eng.
items.quote: And in his last fight, he got knocked out in 25 seconds by Ori Lang.

items.claim: Sam Patterson is coming off a poor performance against Michael Venom Paige.
items.quote: Sam Patterson coming off of one of the worst fights in UFC history against Michael Venom Paige.

items.claim: Sam Patterson is a massive betting favorite at around minus 425.
items.quote: At about minus 425, Patterson will be the biggest favorite in this three-legg parlay.
